reviews.title: Nice, just don't like having to remove them to charge it
reviews.text: I really like them and my AirPods feel much more secure in my ears.  I can move my head and they don't fall out.  The only thing I don't like is that they won't charge in the charger unless you remove them.

reviews.title: Solves AirPod Issue
reviews.text: I have a love/hate relationship with my AirPods and these are making me love them a LOT more. On their own, my AirPods cause my ears to hurt terribly. Not to mention, they fall out at the slightest movement, like smiling or turning my head. Talk about ANNOYING. These tips cure those ailments. Now I can exercise with my AirPods in and never worry about them falling out. I have tiny ears, and the fit is great with no discomfort at all. I love that the little hook sticks up into the cartilage of my ear to make a really secure fit. The silicon keeps the buds from irritating my ears too. I’m so happy I got these. Now I can actually put my AirPods to good use.

reviews.title: These Really Help to Keep the AirPods 2nd gen in Place.
reviews.text: The only issue I've every had with my AirPods is them staying in while active. These are comfortable and keep them in place along with them being comfortable.

reviews.title: Worked great on OnePlus earbuds

reviews.title: Works with iPhone 13
reviews.text:
This appears to use analog out over Lighting rather than having a DAC in the cable. Evidence is that there is volume control similar to using headphones rather than the no volume when plugged into an audio interface. Also if you touch the connector while plugged into speakers you get the sort of popping and cracking found when messing with a headphone cable.

So in summary, it just works.

title: 6 Packs(12 Pieces) in-Ear Monitor Replacement Memory Foam Tips 3mm Earplugs Earbud Cover for Balanced Armatured Headphone T-100(Medium, Yellow)
description:
Inner diameter: 3mm Outer diameter:12.5mmSize: Medium QTY: 6 pairs
NO EAR FATIGUE.
These foam earphone tips are softer than silicone tip material, Great elasticity and recovery make the tips perfectly fit your ear canal, very comfortable.
BETTER COMFORT
Slow-rebound material, uniquely breath-activated earmuffs activated by body temperature, gives you a new experience without irritation or fatigue.
PREMIUM SOUND.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
MORE ISOLATION
With the ear canal properly sealed by the earbud tips, you don't need to increase volume to enjoy music in a noisy environment.
LITTLE USING TIPS
Before wearing earbuds, squeeze the sponge tips with your hands, so they will automatically inflate and perfectly fit your ear canal after wearing. That will create better sound insulation. The memory foam is about 11mm high, the largest diameter is about 12mm, and the inner diameter of the catheter is about 3mm.Made of high-quality, environmentally friendly and non-toxic materials, it has the advantages of softer, slower rebound and more durable. Memory foam is characterized by a slow rebound effect, which can change its own shape with external pressure. From the perspective of earplugs, the ear canal varies from person to person, and the memory foam will change their shape according to the individual's ear canal, making them fit the ear canal best, thus achieving more than ordinary eartips cover good wearing comfort, better noise reduction effect, bring better listening experience. Applicable to the following earplugs: SE series:  SE110/SE112/SE115/SE210/SE215/SE310/SE315/SE420/SE425/SE530/SE535/SE846 E3C/E4C/E5C/E3G/E4G/E500/i3C/i4C/ SC series: SCL3/SCL4/SCL5/
features: 6 Pairs of replacement tips fit on 3mm cavity tube diameter for balanced armatured in-ear monitor.Please measure the outer diameter of your earplug cavity tube before purchasing, and refer to the picture to obtain the appropriate model.
The only earbud tips that adopt separate packaging; each pair is individually packed in its own little baggie; convenient for storage.
Not like other cheap earphone tips, these are high quality memory foam ear bud tips which would not fall apart or disintegrate.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
Before wearing, you may need to squeeze the ear tips and put them in your ear and they expand to fit. These are pretty stretchy and stay in place.

reviews.title: Not a quality product
reviews.text: I needed these to fit my Sony earbuds which are always smaller than normal earbuds. I've used Comply in the past and loved them but they're expensive. Should have bought them anyway. These are small plastic tubes inserted into blue memory foam. The tubes don't stretch to wrap around the tip of the earbud the way quality products do and the tubes are apparently not glued to the memory foam as they separate when you're trying to install them.

reviews.title: Hold really well
reviews.text: Really like these foam tips. They hold extremely well in my ears whether I'm hitting hitting the punching bag, jogging or cutting grass.

reviews.title: The quanity you get for the price + the quality is excellent
reviews.text: I like the comfort, quality, and price of these replacement earbuds.  The foam holds up well to use, they never fall off, and they do block out sound around you but not so much you can't hear that someone spoke to you.  The price and quantity is the best on Amazon

reviews.title: Not so great
reviews.text: I bought these as an inexpensive replacement for my ear buds. They took quite a bit of twisting and pushing to get into my ear without feeling like they would fall out. With that, after just a couple days, the outer section broke away from the inner so they no longer fit on the ear bud. I do not recommend purchasing.

reviews.title: Perfect replacement size
reviews.text: Very comfortable, noise isolating, fits my older Phillips SHR 9850 earbuds like new. Like the color because you can tell when they are dirty & need to be replaced.

title: 2 Pack iPhone Earbuds [Apple MFi Certified] Wired in-Ear Stereo Noise Canceling Isolating Lightning Headphones with Built-in Microphone&Volume Control Compatible with iPhone 13 12 SE 11 X 8 7-All iOS
description:
Using the Step
1.Quick and Easy Connection scheme one:After plugging in the headphones, a window will appear, click "Connect with iCloud" to use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets". 2.Connection scheme two: a.The first time you use it, you need to enter the iPhone settings and turn on Bluetooth. b.Bluetooth page: Find "Baets" in Other Devices, click "Baets" to connect(The headset will automatically connect to your device the next time, so you don’t need to do this step again.) Need Attention: It must be connected to Bluetooth for normal use. And it must always be connected to Bluetooth during use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets".

reviews.title: Handy

reviews.title: Neckbands are fine, but earhooks are useless for me
reviews.text:
The neckbands worked fine, and all items gripped my gen 2 AirPods okay, but the earhooks were not even a little useful for me.

I’m used to wearing headphones with integral earhooks, and loved the fit of those, but these add-on earhooks for Airpods do not have the right amount of rigidity, nor is it easy enough to rotate and position them appropriately with respect to the AirPod stem so that the combined geometry of the two would ever align to my ear. Because of those two factors, they simultaneously made my AirPods look kind of stupid while at the same time actually making the fit/hold even worse; they seemed almost more likely to fall out with the hooks than without them.

reviews.title: [review for non ANC version] Pretty good deal for it's money
reviews.text:
I lost accurate track of time, but it was definitely more than 60hr of battery life. very impressive, a little scary to carry this much power on my head, but logically I understand that risks of catching fire or batteries exploding is negligible)

* sound quality - awesome (in terms of sound itself)
* build and material quality - impressive
* bluetooth connectivity - awesome. range, stability, reconnect speed, sound quality (in terms of losses via bluetooth while in varying range of "hotspot with music").
* battery quality - a little bit over a week of daily uses for 8hr+ a day. just perfect. That will be enough for a business trip out of town for a couple of days and back without need to recharge and sometimes even without prior notice to recharge before I go.
* distinct controls (bumps with space between them) - awesome. easy to use, easy to locate, no mistakes)
* folding capabilities - they do fold/unfold, but I tried it only once upon unpacking, but I rarely use this feature

The only minus that I can see in the last 20 days is how the headband is stretching when I'm wearing headphones. Looks dangerous (in terms of longevity). That's all I think. If this headphones will last more than a year I would call them perfect for a price and capabilities (tiny note about non ANC version and that's it)

So final score (while they last) 10/10

reviews.title: It is not passive soundproofing it is active. Which is NOT what I need.
reviews.text:
I have difficulty finding headphones with passive noise canceling for whatever reason and so I saw that this listing said passive and it was from the same brand as one I am still using. (It's breaking down due to age)

Active soundproofing is extremely detrimental to someone with audio disorders like myself since it makes a low buzzing noise that I can't tune out.

It does work as headphones but I would like to have it refunded so I can get another pair with the format of soundproofing I need.

reviews.title: AWESOME HEADPHONES!!
reviews.text: AWESOME headphones for music or phone calls!! Pairs up with my phone, usually within seconds. I listen to tons of YouTube music videos with these and the sound rivals more expensive sets. For the price on these you just can't go wrong!! Battery life is amazing too!!!

reviews.text: Really cute but still too big for my 6 year old son :(

reviews.title: I originally bought these for my son but I love them myself
reviews.text: I originally bought these for my son but I love them myself. I may get another pair for me. I've always had trouble with earbuds and now I know it was because they were too big for me ears. These fit comfortably. They also fit my son. So great for that too.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Perfect size for my 4 year old

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Kid sound monitoring safety headphones love them

reviews.title: Great for those headphones that are on the school supply list!
reviews.text: The only complaints we have with these are that the headband feels kind of flimsy and doesn't seem to adjust and also the ear foam finds its way off after awhile. However, with that being said, I would also like to note that the size is perfect (for my 5 year old daughter), the sound is pretty dang good for kids headphones and the design is cute.
